SEARCH
Package bupt.ta.service

Class EmailOtpService

java.lang.Object
bupt.ta.service.EmailOtpService
public class EmailOtpService extends Object
Email OTP (one-time password) generation + verification. Storage is persisted via DataStorage so restarts don't invalidate codes.

      public EmailOtpService()

  • Method Details

    • requestOtp

      public EmailOtpService.OtpRequestResult requestOtp(DataStorage storage, String email, String purpose, AdminSettings adminSettings) throws IOException
      Generates an OTP, persists it, and sends it via email (HTML + text).
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      email - recipient address
      purpose - logical purpose (e.g. REGISTER, RESET_PASSWORD)
      adminSettings - optional admin SMTP settings
      Returns:
      success flag and detail message
      Throws:
      IOException - if persistence fails

    • verifyOtp

      public EmailOtpService.OtpVerifyResult verifyOtp(DataStorage storage, String email, String purpose, String code) throws IOException
      Verifies an OTP for an email and purpose. On success, marks the latest record as consumed.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      email - address the code was sent to
      purpose - logical purpose matching the request
      code - user-entered verification code
      Returns:
      success flag and detail message
      Throws:
      IOException - if persistence fails
